seoTitle: Harristown vs Hatton Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harristown and Hatton Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harristown vs Hatton Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harristown and Hatton Vale.
heading: Harristown vs Hatton Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harristown, Queensland and Hatton Vale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hatton Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Harristown (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harristown or Hatton Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harristown has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Hatton Vale scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harristown scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Hatton Vale scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harristown or Hatton Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hatton Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
